## Scope Control

- [ ] `manifest.yaml` 已列出修改檔案
- [ ] 未包含 Secret、Credential、敏感資料或未授權資料

## Verification

- [ ] Unit Test
- [ ] Integration／Contract Test

## Spec & Operations

- [ ] Requirement／Design／Task 已同步
- [ ] Living Specs 已更新或標示 Closure 前更新
- [ ] Migration／Rollback 已驗證
- [ ] Monitoring／Alert／Runbook 已更新
- [ ] Drift Check 通過
